message:
feat(frankenpandas): re-export DuplicateKeep + ConcatJoin + DropNaHow (br-rdmu2 / fd90.128)

fd90.128: three more public enums used in README examples but missing
from frankenpandas's re-export and prelude:

- DuplicateKeep — used at README lines 1536, 1600, 1603, 1610
  (defined at crates/fp-index/src/lib.rs:251)
- ConcatJoin — used at README lines 1214, 1217
  (defined at crates/fp-frame/src/lib.rs:14474)
- DropNaHow — used at README lines 985, 988
  (defined at crates/fp-frame/src/lib.rs:14745)

A user copy-pasting from 'use frankenpandas::prelude::*' would hit
8 E0433/E0422 'cannot find type' errors across these examples.

Fix:
1. Add to top-level re-exports (DuplicateKeep alongside other fp_index
   types; ConcatJoin + DropNaHow alongside other fp_frame types).
2. Add all three to the prelude in alphabetical order in the Core types
   section.

Verified:
- cargo build -p frankenpandas — compiles
- cargo test -p frankenpandas --lib — all 5 prelude tests pass

Pure re-export expansion. No behavior change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
